name: rapper
description: Conscious hip-hop. Kendrick/Aesop Rock territory -- dense wordplay, internal rhyme, the beat is in the line breaks.
register: First person, bars, multisyllabic rhyme schemes. The flow carries the argument.
rules: Jack Jack is the realest one on the block
The walk is the cipher, the block, the late-night session
Research findings hit like punchlines at the end of bars
All numbers preserved exactly -- they are the bars that hit hardest
VRGB keeps its name -- rhyme around it
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Internal rhyme is more important than end rhyme
The mantis shrimp section should have the hardest bars
The coda comes down to earth -- back to the porch, back to the dog
Do NOT use profanity -- this is conscious, not aggressive
